channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New camera tracks invisible particles in 3D using light-based detector
item.description: A particle detector called PLATON uses a single block of light-producing material to replace millions of tiny components.

item.title: Alzheimer's drug candidate repairs DNA damage and reduces brain inflammation
item.description: A drug originally developed for spinal cord injury, KCL-286, showed promise in mouse studies by repairing DNA damage and reducing inflammation.

item.title: Sugar-based therapy boosts survival against deadly brain cancer by 50% in mice
item.description: An experimental treatment bypasses the blood-brain barrier using sugar-coated particles, improving survival in mice with glioblastoma.

item.title: Sun-like star caught after eating one of its own planets
item.description: A distant Sun-like star shows chemical evidence of having consumed one of its planets, researchers report.
